name: How much money can I get for forklift crushing my leg on the job?
description: $100K+ for moderate; millions for severe like amputation—factors: injury permanence, wages, future care.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for forklift crushing my leg on the job?

acceptedAnswer.text: $100K+ for moderate; millions for severe like amputation—factors: injury permanence, wages, future care.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Settlements range $120K-$20M depending on injury severity, lost wages, and permanency; average verdicts $130K-$221K for fractures.** Catastrophic cases with amputation/brain damage yield millions.[2][3] Key factors: Medical bills, future care, pain/suffering, wage loss (2/3 typically); Utah/Idaho caps don't apply to third-party suits. Multi-party fault reduces via comparative negligence.[5] Value via attorney case review with similar verdicts. Pursue max through negotiation or trial.
